# Paperwork Needed and the how-to's of uplodaing the rosters

**1 message** on 2026-04-28

## 1. 2026-04-28 14:28 — no_reply@gotsport.com

- If you have not uploaded your roster and cards OR put your roster
in roster builder, you need to complete this before yoru first game or you
may not be able to play.
  -
  -
  - Upolad your roster on gotsport- this allows us to print game cards.
Instructions may be found here:

 *Roster Builder* needs to be completed!
https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30911866/gotsport.zendesk.com?
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30911866/gotsport.zendesk.com?>*

   - *Upload paperwork- This is needed for the state*
  -  GotSport Upload Instructions for Paperwork

 1. Log into your GotSport Account, click on the Team Management Button in
the top menu bar, then click registrations on the left side
2. Find your team and Fusion Invitational Tournament 2024 to upload the
required documents for Check in and click on Fusion Invitational Tournament
2024
3. Then click on Registration at the top menu
4. Then click on the edit button at the top of the page and upload your
documents in the fields (PDF documents)
5. Click save to upload your information.

 Needed: Official Roster, Player & Coach Pass Cards, Coach Risk Management,
Coach Safesport, Coach CDC Heads Up Certificate, Manager Risk Management,
Manager Safesport, Manager CDC Heads Up Certificate.

 If using guest players: Copy of guest player form and player cards
(through tournament center MSYSA) for ALL players not on the official
roster.





 Preliminary brackets will be out today--
